case_number: Criminal Bail Application No. S-20 of 2025

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Bail Application No. S-20 of 2025 “Muhammad Asif v. The State” DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Azhar Arain advocate for applicant/ accused. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Dalwani, DPG. = Counsel for the applicant states that he intends to withdraw present bail application as parties after negotiation have entered into compromise and he intends to file bail application before the trial Court on fresh ground of compromise. In view of above, instant bail application is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE “Saleem”
